blocks.content: The Kingdom of Stang. Located at the southernmost part of the central continent, it was relatively less affected by the demons.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Due to the Elemental Bomb Project, most of the army of hell entered the flower fields of Vashka.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Then they were all scattered to the south after being baptized by Shirone's light.

Yes. They struck the southern continent like shrapnel. However, the southern continent, unlike the central continent, is not densely populated with nations, and the number of demons had already decreased, so catastrophic damage was avoided.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And the southern continent is... the only region where the legion commander's demon realm hasn't opened.
It was also the place ruled by Fermi.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Whether it's luck or not. But the Kingdom of Stang in the central continent is truly fortunate. Thanks to the demons spreading from Tormia, the Kingdom of Stang in the west suffered almost no damage. Due to these various factors, it is considered one of the candidates to seize the hegemony of the next world.
In other words, it had the potential to stand out in the upcoming holy war.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: From here on, it's the Kingdom of Stang.
As Shirone observed, the wall built along the border stretched to the horizon.
'The fortunate one of the battlefield.' Having an intact wall alone showed how blessed they were.
They had departed before dawn, and when they crossed the border, the morning sun was shining down.
Upon arriving at the border guard, the highest minister of the Kingdom of Stang was already waiting.

blocks.speaker: Official
blocks.content: Star of the Ivory Tower, it is an honor to have you visit our Kingdom of Stang.
The official, bowing deeply, handed over the king's letter with both hands.
As Shirone skimmed the letter, it contained an apology for not being able to come out to greet them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Indeed... not an ordinary person.'

blocks.speaker: Official
blocks.content: His Majesty wished to come out personally. However, due to the influx of immigrants from other countries...

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It's fine.
The words of a politician held no value.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'd like to start with a tour.
The official, already informed by Lampa, bowed as if he had been waiting.

blocks.speaker: Official
blocks.content: Yes. A carriage has been prepared.
The reason they didn't use magic to travel was because it was a 'tour.'
The destination was the newly established 'Stang National Magic School' in the Kingdom of Stang.
While the official handled the procedures, Shirone was able to hear more details from Lampa.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: The Kingdom of Stang, which suffered minimal damage from the war, accepted immigrants and aggressively incorporated talented individuals from around the world. Wena Wizard is one of them.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The fact that it was discovered this late means there was a scheme by the Kingdom of Stang.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Yes. It was kept strictly confidential, and it seems they scouted with a large sum of money. According to the investigation, the position of the head of the Magic Association of the Kingdom of Stang was also conditionally guaranteed.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The head of the Magic Association... It wasn't an offer that could be made to a mere seven-year-old wizard.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'What kind of child could it be?'

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Half curious, half expectant, they entered the school where many students were engrossed in training.
As expected of carefully selected talents, the intensity of the training was considerable, and the ages varied.
While looking for the youngest child, the official, who had finished the tour procedures, came with documents.

blocks.speaker: Official
blocks.content: As requested by the Five Stars, their identity has been kept confidential. The students and teachers believe a royal inspector is visiting.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Yes, thank you.
The comprehensive analysis would have already been completed by the Ten Mages of the Ivory Tower.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Let's observe from a distance.'

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: If it was a seven-year-old child responsible for dealing with the extreme Habitz, it was better to approach cautiously.
Lampa pointed to the 2000th training ground.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: That child is Wizard.
Where Shirone and Amy's gaze turned, a girl was fighting adults.
With a bright face and blonde hair braided into two pigtails, her body was smaller than expected.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'She looks like just an ordinary child.'
But it was clear from her movements that she was beyond the ordinary.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Fun! Fun!
Among the young adults who were deploying magic with all their might, she was the only one having fun.
The most bizarre thing was that all 14 students were targeting Wizard.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What is that...?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Super logic.
It completely deviates from the causality we know. It's not something that can be obtained through training. It's not even talent. Just...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: To define it accurately.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She was born that way.
A presence was felt behind Shirone's party.
Our analysis is the same.

blocks.speaker: Ten Mages
blocks.content: The Ten Mages of the Ivory Tower, five 1-star residents, and their satellites stood in two rows.
At their sudden appearance, the official flinched and instinctively bowed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Thirteen stars gathered in one place? This is unprecedented in our kingdom.'
It was likely due to the value of Wizard.

blocks.speaker: Ten Mages
blocks.content: Greetings to the Five Stars.
After observing Wizard for a long time, Shirone finally turned around.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, nice to meet you. We saw each other during the Ivory Tower's grand assembly. I'm sorry about Mr. Freed.

blocks.speaker: Leader Bartok
blocks.content: The master enjoyed fighting strong opponents. Since the opponent was Ymir, he wouldn't have had any regrets.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thinking the introduction was sufficient, he explained.

blocks.speaker: Leader Bartok
blocks.content: As evaluated by the Five Stars, Wizard is a super logic-based magician. It seems that synesthesia obtained at the fetal stage had a significant impact.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: She sees colors in sounds and hears sounds in shapes. Of course, other magicians can do this too. But the unique point of Wizard is that even her thinking process is synesthetic.

blocks.speaker: Leader Bartok
blocks.content: To use the game of Go from the East as an example, humans predict the next move after making one. Even if they draw the entire sequence in their mind, the order of thinking is strictly logical. But Wizard...

blocks.speaker: Leader Bartok
blocks.content: Disregards causality.

blocks.speaker: Leader Bartok
blocks.content: Yes. It's not reverse thinking, nor is it thinking from the middle. It's like taking a snapshot of the whole thing. Simply put, if humans develop one move at a time...

blocks.speaker: Leader Bartok
blocks.content: Wizard develops the beginning and end of the game, each match, all at once.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: No matter what movements the students attacking Wizard make, or what magic they cast, it doesn't matter. The moment a change occurs, the entire picture is completed in her mind at once.
Shirone watched Wizard's battle.
Bang! Bang! Bang!
She was firing air guns, a basic form of magic, at the older students.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: There's no power.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. She's dealing with the students with the minimum damage that the 2000th can judge. It takes about 2000 hits to knock down one person. Yet the result...
With the scattering air guns, 14 students simultaneously groaned and fell.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is how it happens.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: ...I see. Simultaneous suppression is impossible unless the opponent's mental strength is all set to one.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. The fact that this level of coordination is possible means that thousands of victory patterns have emerged in her mind. If the only goal is to achieve victory, she can win even if 200 people attack. If she accepts some level of damage...

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: He felt uneasy about mentioning that theoretically, she could suppress over 400 people.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Hahaha! I won! I won again!
Wizard, running with her arms raised among the students who were in shock, approached a girl who was gritting her teeth and blew air while biting her tongue.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Fwooo! Fwooo! I won. I won.
The girl's eyes widened.

blocks.speaker: Girl
blocks.content: Damn it!
But seeing the face of a seven-year-old child, she didn't even have the energy to get angry and lowered her head.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Fwooo! Fwooo!
Wizard went around to each of the losers in the 2000th, sticking out her tongue and teasing them.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I won. I'm stronger.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She seems to be particularly mischievous towards the girls.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Yes. She follows the older boys better. There's no malice. She just likes winning and showing off her strength. Of course, from an adult's perspective, that's behavior that should be curbed.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: That's what I'm saying. It's a magic school where skills are tested regardless of age. Why are the teachers just standing by? If this continues, how miserable must the other students feel...
The moment Amy heard the official of the Kingdom of Stang clear his throat, she realized.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: 'Ah, I see.'

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Even if Amy were the king, she wouldn't impose any sanctions on Wizard.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Even if all the students here dropped out, it would be much more beneficial to protect Wizard.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: 'At just four years old, she was ranked 6th among the Ivory Tower candidates. At that time, Shirone was 4th. And three years have passed.'

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Being classified as the nation's top asset, even the principal is cautious around her, as she can handle opponents from level 6 to level 4, transcending eras.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A genius. There's no officially recognized teaching staff. Above all...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It makes sense. Without this level of ability, she wouldn't be able to face Satan.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Conversely, it meant that the price the Ivory Tower would have to pay to take her would be enormous.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'I understand why the king is being so stiff.'
As Shirone turned his head, the official, who had been smiling softly, bowed.

blocks.speaker: Official
blocks.content: Once the tour is over, the real negotiations will begin. Money alone won't solve this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even if they tried to use authority, they wouldn't be able to persuade a seven-year-old child.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Allowing her to indulge in her vanity isn't good. For now, it's just for fun, but once she realizes that victory brings more, her mind will become clouded.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Magical skill was a secondary factor. The necessity of Wizard lay in her purity.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: The Five Stars have a point. But who can control that little rascal? Ordinary children at that age are mindful of their parents, but Wizard is different. She has no superiors. Her skill is already the best in the kingdom, and her potential is the greatest in humanity. If we handle her clumsily, we might end up hurting her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, we mustn't handle her clumsily...

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Teacher, are those older brother and sister magicians too? Can I go say hi? Yes? Yes? Yes?
